name: Green Tomato Jelly
recipeIngredient: 5 cups green tomatoes, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped green tomatoes and 4 cups of sugar in a large saucepan. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
2. Add the unflavored gelatin according to package instructions. Stir until dissolved.
3. Allow the mixture to simmer for about 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Remove from heat and stir in any remaining gelatin powder.
5. Pour the mixture into clean jars, leaving some headspace at the top.
6. Seal the jars tightly with lids.
Walt MM
